name: landing_has_data
description: raw.landing must have at least one row after a pipeline run.

name: landing_is_fresh
description: Most recent ingest must be within the last 24 hours.

name: landing_source_not_null
description: Every row must have a source tag.

name: dim_repos_populated
description: dim_repos should have data (warn only — may be empty on first run).

name: fct_metrics_unique_pk
description: (repo_id, metric_date) must be unique in the daily metrics fact.

name: predictions_recent
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM marts.ml_predictions WHERE predicted_at >= DATEADD(day, -7, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
description: Predictions within the last 7 days exist (warn-only during ML ramp-up).
